overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and reflective wet pavement. The scene transitions from under a curved overpass through open plazas and covered walkways, showcasing futuristic architecture and scattered pedestrians with umbrellas.

segments.scene_description: Walking under a massive curved overpass with glowing cyan light panels, the scene features wet reflective pavement and holographic billboards lining the left side. The camera moves steadily forward, transitioning from the sheltered walkway toward an open plaza visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the overpass into a wide-open plaza, the scene reveals towering skyscrapers with vertical neon lighting and a circular digital kiosk at the center. Pedestrians with umbrellas move through the rain-slicked plaza as the camera approaches the entrance to a covered walkway.

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered pedestrian arcade with overhead linear lighting, the walkway features glowing digital pillars on the right and illuminated bollards on the left. The camera moves through moderate crowds while the MAXWEAR building becomes visible in the distance at the end of the corridor.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway into an open plaza dominated by the MAXWEAR building, the scene features large cylindrical holographic pillars displaying anime characters. The camera turns right to navigate around these pillars, passing pedestrians while moving toward the glass office towers in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a sheltered urban underpass into a vast, rain-soaked futuristic plaza. It begins beneath a massive curved overpass illuminated by glowing cyan light panels, where the camera glides over wet reflective pavement past a series of holographic billboards. As the camera moves steadily forward, the sheltered walkway gives way to an expansive open square, shifting the perspective from enclosed architecture to a towering skyline of neon-lit skyscrapers. The scene then opens up to reveal pedestrians with umbrellas navigating the slick ground around a central circular digital kiosk before the camera approaches the entrance of a new covered walkway.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, neon-lit pedestrian corridor into a vast, open-air cyberpunk plaza. It begins by gliding through a covered arcade under linear overhead lighting, passing glowing digital pillars and illuminated bollards amidst a moderate crowd. As the camera advances, the corridor opens up to reveal the towering MAXWEAR building looming at the end of the walkway. The scene then expands into a wide plaza dominated by large cylindrical holographic pillars displaying anime characters, which the camera navigates around while passing pedestrians. Finally, the perspective shifts right, moving away from the holograms and toward a distant skyline of glass office towers.
